name: sanguosha-html
description: 三国杀 1v1 browser game served as native ES modules from a static GitHub Pages site. v6.1: data-driven skill/card/equipment metadata, pause-prompt player choice for optional skills, all 26 implemented skills verified against official-pack specs through a 7-PR mismatch-fix chain.

scripts.test: for f in tests/*.mjs; do printf '\n===== %s\n' "$f"; node "$f" || exit 1; done
